description: This video explains how to secure your Binance account using various methods including email verification, Google authentication, SMS authentication, Yubikey, and anti-phishing codes. It emphasizes the importance of security in the cryptocurrency industry and provides step-by-step instructions for each security measure.
topic_summary: Learn how to secure your Binance account with email verification [t=36:92], Google authentication [t=80:98], SMS authentication [t=190:66], Yubikey [t=257:17], and anti-phishing codes [t=325:42].
